ns0:entry.ns0:title: Dolibarr/dolibarr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Dolibarr/dolibarr
Language: php
Dolibarr ERP CRM is a modern software package to manage your company or foundation's activity (contacts, suppliers, invoices, orders, stocks, agenda, accounting, ...). it's an open source Web application (written in PHP) designed for businesses of any sizes, foundations and freelancers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PHPMailer/PHPMailer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PHPMailer/PHPMailer
Language: php
The classic email sending library for PHP

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PHPOffice/PhpSpreadsheet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PHPOffice/PhpSpreadsheet
Language: php
A pure PHP library for reading and writing spreadsheet files

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PrestaShop/PrestaShop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PrestaShop/PrestaShop
Language: php
PrestaShop is the universal open-source software platform to build your e-commerce solution.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/WordPress
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/WordPress
Language: php
WordPress, Git-ified. This repository is just a mirror of the WordPress subversion repository. Please do not send pull requests. Submit pull requests to https://github.com/WordPress/wordpress-develop and patches to https://core.trac.wordpress.org/ instead.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/wordpress-develop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/wordpress-develop
Language: php
WordPress Develop, Git-ified. Synced from git://develop.git.wordpress.org/, including branches and tags! This repository is just a mirror of the WordPress subversion repository. Please include a link to a pre-existing ticket on https://core.trac.wordpress.org/ with every pull request.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coollabsio/coolify
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coollabsio/coolify
Language: php
An open-source, self-hostable PaaS alternative to Vercel, Heroku & Netlify that lets you easily deploy static sites, databases, full-stack applications and 280+ one-click services on your own servers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: danielmiessler/SecLists
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/danielmiessler/SecLists
Language: php
SecLists is the security tester's companion. It's a collection of multiple types of lists used during security assessments, collected in one place. List types include usernames, passwords, URLs, sensitive data patterns, fuzzing payloads, web shells, and many more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dompdf/dompdf
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dompdf/dompdf
Language: php
HTML to PDF converter for PHP

ns0:entry.ns0:title: filamentphp/filament
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/filamentphp/filament
Language: php
A powerful open-source UI framework for Laravel • Build and ship apps & admin panels fast with Livewire

ns0:entry.ns0:title: freescout-help-desk/freescout
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/freescout-help-desk/freescout
Language: php
FreeScout — Free self-hosted help desk & shared mailbox (Zendesk / Help Scout alternative)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: glpi-project/glpi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/glpi-project/glpi
Language: php
GLPI is a Free Asset and IT Management Software package, Data center management, ITIL Service Desk, licenses tracking and software auditing.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kanboard/kanboard
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kanboard/kanboard
Language: php
Kanban project management software

Language: php
Mautic: Open Source Marketing Automation Software.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: modelcontextprotocol/php-sdk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/php-sdk
Language: php
The official PHP SDK for Model Context Protocol servers and clients. Maintained in collaboration with The PHP Foundation.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: opensourcepos/opensourcepos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/opensourcepos/opensourcepos
Language: php
Open Source Point of Sale is a web based point of sale application written in PHP using CodeIgniter framework. It uses MySQL as the data back end and has a Bootstrap 3 based user interface.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: opnsense/core
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/opnsense/core
Language: php
OPNsense GUI, API and systems backend

Language: php
Core Framework for the Open Core Data & Experience Management Platform (PIM, MDM, CDP, DAM, DXP/CMS & Digital Commerce)

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Language: php

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/symfony/symfony
Language: php
The Symfony PHP framework

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vlucas/phpdotenv
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vlucas/phpdotenv
Language: php
Loads environment variables from `.env` to `getenv()`, `$_ENV` and `$_SERVER` automagically.
